titles.title: You Are My All in All – v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are my strength when I am weak You are the treasure that I seek You are my all in all. Seeking you as a precious jewel I want the Holy Ghost to rule You are my all in all.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, lamb of God, worthy is your name, Jesus, lamb of God, worthy is your name.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Taking my sin my cross my shame Rising again I bless your name You are my all in all. When I fall down you pick me up When I am dry you fill my cup You are my all in all.
